name: statusdot
title: StatusDot
description: Live status dot with label; `pulse` radiates for running/connected states.

files.content:
Live status dot with label; `pulse` radiates for running/connected states.

```jsx
<StatusDot state="ok" pulse label="Connected" />
<StatusDot state="busy" pulse label="Running" />
<StatusDot state="err" label="Failed" />
```
